title: GAP MINISTRIES - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Basic goods are offered to clients as they are donated. Goods available may include, but are not limited to household items (cleaning supplies, laundry detergent, toilet paper, and paper towels), personal care supplies (such as toothbrushes and shampoo), durable medical goods, diapers and wipes, linens, towels and blankets, kitchenware (dishes, pots and pans, glasses, etc), and baby blankets. Connects people in need with local churches and service agencies. No financial assistance is available. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low income individuals and families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-1pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Email (541) 924-5683 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 924-5683 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Breast Pumps Diapers General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Kitchenware Maternity Clothing Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRANSFORMATIONAL CLASSES MATERIAL GOODS - DRESS FOR SUCCESS CAREER CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY
